files.api/index.js: Routes appended (POST/GET /api/whatsapp/send|webhook|messages|templates) + helper sendWhatsAppGraph + global.__waSend; trigger inserted in POST /api/sales for fire-and-forget order_confirmation when customer.phone present.
files.db/R17_WHATSAPP.sql: Tables whatsapp_messages (in/out, status, wa_id, sent_at) + whatsapp_subscribers (phone, tenant_id, customer_id, opt_in_at) with indices and UNIQUE(phone,tenant_id).
files.volvix-whatsapp-wiring.js: Replaced mock with real backend wiring; window.WhatsAppAPI (send/sendQuick/templates/messages); floating widget FAB + panel with template dropdown.
files.R17_WHATSAPP.md: Setup Meta Business Suite, env vars (WHATSAPP_TOKEN, WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID, WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN), Twilio fallback notes, curl test commands.

notes: Webhook GET valida hub.verify_token; POST persiste mensajes incoming en whatsapp_messages (direction=in). Idioma template default es_MX. Helpers expuestos en globalThis para reuso por triggers.
